name: Corn and Tomato Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 ears fresh corn (or 1 to 1 1/2 cups of kernels)
3 tablespoons fresh lime or lemon juice
1/4 cup (packed) cilantro or parsley leaves (roughly chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil.
2. Finely chop the onion and add it to the pot. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes, or until tender.
3. While the onions are cooking, core the tomatoes, seed them, and chop them. Add these to the pot and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer. Remove the corn kernels from the ears of corn; add them to the broth and simmer for 4 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat. Add the lime or lemon juice and season with salt and dried red pepper flakes to taste. Garnish with cilantro or parsley.
Yield: 2 servings
